mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM member_goods_cart t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.id},'%')
AND t.member_id like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.memberId},'%')
AND t.goods_id like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.goodsId},'%')
AND t.option_id like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.optionId},'%')
AND t.total like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.total},'%')
AND t.price like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.price},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.status},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.isDeleted},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM member_goods_cart t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.id},'%')
AND t.member_id like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.memberId},'%')
AND t.goods_id like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.goodsId},'%')
AND t.option_id like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.optionId},'%')
AND t.total like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.total},'%')
AND t.price like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.price},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.status},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{memberGoodsCartEntity.isDeleted},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM member_goods_cart t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
